archetype: 2 (Performance Pro) mixed with 7 (Electric/Neon) for energetic feel

icons.rules: Use clear, sharp icons. Active states in Lime #DBFF02, inactive in Mid Gray #666666.

layout_and_screens.splash: Full screen splash_background image using ImageBackground. Center the white logo. Add an ActivityIndicator or custom glowing Lime loader at the bottom.
layout_and_screens.onboarding: Dark background (#0A0A0A). Large, bold typography for questions. Use 'cards' for selectable options (e.g. goals) with Lime border on active. Use ScrollView to prevent keyboard/small screen overlap.
layout_and_screens.dashboard: Header with 'Hello, User' and a small notification icon. Use horizontal FlatLists for quick stats (Water, Calories, Workout). High contrast typography.
layout_and_screens.smart_menu: Vertical FlatList of meal cards. Each card has an image (from 'meals' array), an absolute positioned overlay (backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'), and bold white text for meal name.
layout_and_screens.nutrition_tracker: Use SVG-based circular progress ring or stacked bar chart for macros. Emphasize remaining calories in large bold font.
layout_and_screens.water_intake: Visual representation of water level using primary Green #26B50F. Quick add buttons (+250ml) styled as primary buttons.
layout_and_screens.social_feed: Feed of posts. Each post is a View card. Author name, time, image/text, and interaction row (like, comment).
layout_and_screens.ai_assistant: Chat interface (FlatList inverted=true). User bubbles: background_surface (#1A1A1A) with text_primary. AI bubbles: dark green (#26B50F with 20% opacity) with Lime text. Input field pinned to bottom via KeyboardAvoidingView.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements must have a 'testID' attribute in React Native. Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., testID='login-submit-button'.
accessibility_and_testing.accessibility: Use accessibilityLabel and accessibilityRole on primary buttons and icons to ensure screen reader support.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: This is a React Native app. Do not use standard HTML/CSS, Shadcn, or Tailwind web classes. Use React Native's StyleSheet API and core components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, Image, FlatList).
Ensure all backgrounds are explicitly set to the dark hex values (#0A0A0A or #1A1A1A) as the default RN background is light on some devices.
For icons, use @expo/vector-icons which is built into Expo.
Images should use 'source={{ uri: ... }}' with absolute URIs provided in the media section.

For text styles, map the Inter fonts appropriately. If using Expo, you'll need to use expo-font to load 'Inter-Bold', 'Inter-SemiBold', 'Inter-Regular'. During MVP, if fonts aren't explicitly loaded in the boilerplate, fallback to system fonts with weights ('700', '600', '400').
Adhere strictly to the 8px base spacing grid (8, 16, 24, 32).
Always use KeyboardAvoidingView for screens with TextInputs (like Login and Chat).
Do not assume routing is already set up. You will likely need @react-navigation/native and @react-navigation/bottom-tabs if not already provided.
